problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
